
 
 
## *************particleSwarm-volume multiple2-mean: resultFilemultiple2*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'swarm_size': 400, 'c1': 1.5, 'c2': 2, 'w': 0.1, 'k': 80, 'p': 2, 'niter': 1000, 'ftol': 0.001, 'ftol_iter': 20}
Energy = 0.14383136027910054
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([236.93341556975577, -171.58014803510665, 256.62477405642653, 6.3798482102115, 126.32477994595561, 133.25017404904628, 14.570514830592638, 160.36258862094553, 482.91583762795267, 10.934069212162472, 10.667911935268197, -98.26068975982469, 590.9892412418125, 221.81974762118188, 141.57855054873755, -60.53640024143099, 630.0801216879635, -188.46120215715698, 102.11442276177107, -32.45129364581376, 302.1252713043992, 160.12960240725747, 45.894613706811846, -51.64553488043329, 596.4021683859755, -155.30782828195106, -162.50335623576032, -19.000469721802002, 253.7211256168322, 16.68339419921556, 174.98374867930454, -86.4097198619779, 160.53382926564692, -161.85678300261785, -193.12883778189527, -89.04762198567275, -513.0556478280663, 173.02236077426116, 10.25778351807829, -199.5089232763526, 132.6561164805842, 193.1590723847136, -141.50416730569017, 51.03479059367948, 478.74134366536197, 241.46425590964498, -151.673986074464, -30.85918053894277, 43.48625580517251, -180.152403834898, 39.449299561723834, -56.012979883479126, 48.75961923434261, 40.85844162031509, 175.28873010805657, -199.1291244226212, 557.6556133252212, -353.2010709670091, 89.86974916231843, -155.60808750009173, 524.4661988985268, -254.055898015088, 25.37623663758333, 214.6148527305284, 82.28779503155818, -68.36161096021492, -40.01062919602078, 137.68254442238748, 464.5429851201265, 419.43382377872507, -69.7026378247023, 157.14501963824148, 290.25029296236517, -110.69571644971816, 59.86159976670496, -293.81941214998886, 162.16143037928225, -293.3389799395562, 143.70758358939275, -52.84754869886608])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 22.23 minutes
 
 
## *************adam-volume multiple2-mean: resultFilemultiple2*************** ##
 
 
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
fig = plt.figure()
ax = fig.add_subplot(111, projection='3d')
p = 0.2
SNR = 15
N = 20
f = 10
bounds = np.array([[-1000, -1000, -300, -300],[1000, 1000, 300, 300]])
optimization_options = {'learning_rate': 1, 'max_steps': 10000, 'ftol': 0.0001, 'tolerance_steps': 200}
Energy = 0.09509273045481863
e2 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e1 = 64.12*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
e3 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,0.5,0.0])
e4 = 536.35*np.array([0.8660254037844386,-0.5,0.0])
FinalState = np.array([293.61075231484307, -137.09745479669493, 160.8301181936152, 44.06031137847368, 108.22321445529757, 127.81521647438001, -161.4068078287119, 145.20619870387867, 629.2937520828763, 201.28163127239526, 88.03965620386055, -77.07521708209929, 663.2133419120904, 311.01021734611146, 57.406599584156, -55.151519315561664, 669.7084071481245, -340.38926299437804, 95.53741955130647, -53.27104525480156, 256.1981484047281, 261.9453947499065, 77.9583471039545, -54.648890243677556, 629.9427842642464, -216.80725102473824, -136.56735532524635, 31.99802857981465, 285.9350609473501, 131.79963098484757, 140.3430274066215, -151.41430672706832, 278.67992035086496, -118.05311012616666, -227.5778456085888, -110.40071922016584, -388.8400420783668, -3.370249389309604, 136.17052122699184, -100.93123696279983, 135.49094010896746, 211.22870273908546, -262.35937911414675, -19.977015474409114, 569.6903114297643, 344.325964110735, -182.82038640170052, 49.46221876623182, 121.75903889230729, -180.66224653829548, 90.37877963081785, -89.6339656326233, 101.57473918886106, -37.41887259843696, 177.080108128891, -178.0260807033244, 557.0131551149447, -371.92791872417683, 22.945861470893647, -128.2116620620198, 574.5573200545624, -310.0511687266977, -22.5555212894992, 139.32459427992646, 215.12802356072402, 2.9305861273825364, -63.27381427093647, 119.92604144740645, 568.4335251745107, 349.3422449677376, -61.96911476420258, 174.5566867725174, 383.84950990096917, 16.471843454984562, 83.26145501489579, -62.26778372110749, 238.58855408093984, -270.73965597341703, 62.99102101297008, -91.44423725724167])
FinalState = FinalState.reshape(N, 3)
ax.scatter(FinalState[:,0], FinalState[:,1], FinalState[:,2], c='g', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e1[0],e1[1],e1[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e2[0],e2[1],e2[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e3[0],e3[1],e3[2], c='r', marker='o')
ax.scatter(e4[0],e4[1],e4[2], c='r', marker='o')
plt.plot([0,e4[0]], [0,e4[1]], '--', c='k')
plt.plot([0,e3[0]], [0,e3[1]], '--', c='k')
ax.set_xlabel('x'); ax.set_ylabel('y'); ax.set_zlabel('z')
ax.set_title('Energy=' + str(np.round(Energy, 4)))
plt.show()


#Finished in 1.67 minutes
